raw_response: The Acer Swift Go 14 is a budget-friendly option for students who need a reliable laptop for basic tasks like document editing and web browsing. Despite its lower price point, it offers decent performance with an AMD Ryzen 5 processor and 16GB of RAM. The 14-inch IPS display provides clear visuals, though it's somewhat dim. With a lightweight design and up to 11 hours of battery life, this laptop is portable and convenient for daily use on the go.
